Professional Property Services

We take the stress out of property management with a complete, local service tailored to your exact needs.

From clearing a family estate with compassion to managing a complex commercial move, Mike and his team handle every detail. We focus on heavy lifting and ethical disposal so you can focus on what matters most.

  • Full & Partial House Clearances
  • Probate & Bereavement Services
  • Commercial Property Clearances
  • Garage, Loft & Basement Tidy
  • Garden & Outbuilding Clearance
  • End of Tenancy Clearances

Environmentally Committed: We don't just clear; we care. We prioritize recycling and ensure reusable items are donated to local charities. Every project is handled with the utmost respect, leaving your property clear, tidy, and ready for its next chapter.

Expert Clearance

Do I need to be at the property?

How much does it cost?

Every job is unique. We provide free local site visits to give you an exact price with no hidden fees or add-ons later.

Cookie Policy

This policy explains what cookies are, which ones this website uses, and how you can control them.

Last updated: May 2026

What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to site owners.

Cookies We Use

This website uses only essential cookies required for basic operation. We do not use advertising, tracking, or profiling cookies. If Google Analytics or Google Tag Manager is enabled in future, this policy will be updated and a consent banner displayed.

How to Control Cookies

You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Deleting essential cookies may affect how this website functions. For more information visit aboutcookies.org.

Contact

Privacy Policy

Mike's House Clearance is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use your personal data.

Last updated: May 2026

Who We Are

Mike's House Clearance is a sole trader business operating across Devon, Cornwall, and Somerset. Our website address is mikes-house-clearance.co.uk.

What Data We Collect

When you fill in our contact form or contact us directly, we may collect your name, telephone number, postcode, email address, and any details you provide about your clearance. We do not collect any data automatically beyond standard server logs.

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used solely to respond to your enquiry and provide a quote. We do not sell, share, or pass your data to any third party. Photos sent via WhatsApp are used strictly for quoting purposes and are deleted once the job is complete.

How Long We Keep Your Data

Enquiry data is kept for no longer than 12 months. If you become a customer, we retain basic records for up to 6 years for accounting purposes as required by HMRC.

Your Rights

Under UK GDPR you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data at any time. To exercise any of these rights, contact Mike directly by phone.

Cookies

Our website uses only essential cookies required for basic operation. Please see our Cookie Policy for full details.

Contact

For any privacy-related questions, call Mike on 07347300798.

Ring Mike: 07347300798 Contact Mike

About Mike's House Clearance

Family-run, fully licensed, and built on trust — Mike's House Clearance has been helping people across Devon, Cornwall, and Somerset clear their properties with care and professionalism.

Mike started this business with a simple belief: clearance work should be done properly, honestly, and with respect for the people who need it most. Whether you're dealing with a bereavement, a house move, or simply a build-up of years gone by, Mike and his team treat every job — and every customer — with the same care and attention.

Every clearance is handled personally. Mike doesn't subcontract or send strangers to your door. You deal with Mike directly from the first call to the final sweep.

  • Environment Agency Licensed Waste Carrier
  • Fully Insured — Public Liability Cover
  • Registered in England & Wales
  • Free, No-Obligation Quotes
  • Eco-Friendly — We Recycle & Donate
  • 5-Star Rated Local Service

Our Promise: We leave every property clean, tidy, and ready for its next chapter. Items in good condition are donated to local charities wherever possible. Nothing goes to landfill that doesn't have to.

Terms and Conditions

Please read these terms carefully before booking a clearance with Mike's House Clearance.

Last updated: May 2026

1. Our Service

Mike's House Clearance provides residential and commercial property clearance services across Devon, Cornwall, and Somerset. All work is carried out by Mike and his team as agreed at the time of quotation.

2. Quotations

All quotes are free and no-obligation. Quotes are based on information provided by the customer. If the volume or nature of the clearance differs significantly from the description given, a revised quote may be provided before work begins.

3. Payment

Payment terms are agreed at the time of booking. We accept cash and bank transfer. Payment is due on completion of the clearance unless otherwise agreed in writing.

4. Cancellations

We ask for as much notice as possible if you need to cancel or rearrange. Cancellations within 24 hours of a booked job may incur a charge to cover travel and preparation costs.

5. Waste Disposal

Mike's House Clearance is a licensed waste carrier registered with the Environment Agency. All waste is disposed of legally and responsibly. We prioritise recycling and charity donation over landfill wherever possible.

6. Liability

We are fully insured with public liability cover. We take every care when working in and around your property. Any concerns must be raised on the day of the clearance. We cannot accept liability for pre-existing damage.

7. Valuables

It is the customer's responsibility to remove any items of personal or financial value before the clearance takes place. Mike's House Clearance cannot be held responsible for items left in the property that are subsequently cleared.

8. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

9. Contact

For any questions about these terms, call Mike on 07347300798.

Ring Mike: 07347300798 Contact Mike
description: Terms and conditions for Mike's House Clearance services across Devon, Cornwall, and Somerset.

body_content:
House Clearance Perranarworthal

Perranarworthal is a village set in the wooded valley of the Perran Creek, a tidal inlet running up from the Fal estuary between Truro and Penryn. The TR3 postcode takes in Perranarworthal, Mylor Bridge, Carnon Downs, and the scattered hamlets of the Carnon valley — an area of old mining heritage and characterful rural properties.

Mike's House Clearance works regularly throughout this area, clearing properties in the creek-side villages and surrounding lanes. Free quote by phone or WhatsApp, with same-day response.

Ring Mike: 07347300798 Contact Mike

What We Clear in Perranarworthal

  • Full and partial house clearances
  • Rural and valley property clearances
  • Probate and bereavement clearances
  • Garage and outbuilding clearance
  • Garden clearance
  • End of tenancy clearances

Environment Agency Licensed Waste Carrier. Covering Perranarworthal, Carnon Downs, and the wider TR3 area. Free quote by phone or WhatsApp.

House Clearance Calstock

Calstock is a historic village perched above the River Tamar in the far east of Cornwall, known for its Victorian viaduct and terraced hillside streets. Properties here often have difficult access — steep lanes, narrow gates, and limited parking — and Mike's team is experienced in working efficiently in exactly these conditions across the PL18 postcode.

We cover Calstock village, Gunnislake, Albaston, and the surrounding Tamar Valley communities. Full clearances, probate work, and single-item removals all handled with care.

body_content:
House Clearance Landrake

Landrake is a quiet rural village set in the rolling farmland between Saltash and Liskeard, just off the A38 in the PL12 postcode area. Mike's House Clearance serves Landrake and the surrounding villages including Tideford, Hatt, and Clapper — working across the country lanes and farm tracks that characterise this part of south-east Cornwall.

Rural properties often accumulate a significant amount over the years. Mike's team clears everything from outbuildings and barns to full farmhouse contents, working efficiently and leaving the property clean and ready.

Ring Mike: 07347300798 Contact Mike

What We Clear in Landrake

  • Full and partial house clearances
  • Rural property and farmhouse clearances
  • Probate and bereavement clearances

Pensilva sits on the southern edge of Bodmin Moor, a tight-knit village community in the Caradon area of Cornwall. Whether you need a full estate clearance, a single-room clear-out, or probate support after a bereavement, Mike handles every job with care and without fuss. Free quote via call or WhatsApp photos.

Gunnislake is a former mining town perched on the steep western bank of the River Tamar, with dramatic valley views and a mix of older terraced cottages and more modern housing. It's the last crossing point into Cornwall before the Tamar Bridge, sitting at the heart of the PL18 postcode alongside Calstock, Albaston, and Latchley.

Common Questions

Are you fully licensed?

Absolutely. We are an Environment Agency Licensed Waste Carrier and fully insured for all residential and commercial work.

Do I need to be at the property?

No. We regularly work with solicitors, estate agents, and landlords. We can collect keys and provide before and after photos.

How much does it cost?

Every job is unique. We provide free local site visits to give you an exact price with no hidden fees or add-ons later.
